purpose: Record final release usability-study readiness, missing participant evidence, and release-gate status for the v0.6.0 task-first UI without telemetry or personal speech data.

participantAvailability.blocker: No consented final release-usability participant notes, recordings, transcripts, or task observations were provided to this Linux agent session. The agent cannot synthesize human participant evidence or claim usability gates passed.
participantAvailability.releaseImpact: The final release usability gates have not been measured. Keep issue #255 and the v0.6.0 release usability gate open until consented moderated sessions or an explicit human release decision are recorded.

requiredTasks.task: Produce a first transcript from the Dictate screen, including required model setup if missing.
Enable or create vocabulary and understand that changes apply to later recording boundaries.
Create or continue a voice model enrollment and record prompted speech across the visible voice-condition workflow.
Open training readiness, identify blockers or readiness, and start training when the profile is ready.
Export a personal voice model, understand encrypted export, and identify excluded recordings/checkpoints.
Import a .speechmodel file, understand local validation, and identify incompatible-base recovery.
Find delete-all-local-data, state the removal consequence, and stop before or complete the confirmation intentionally.

comprehensionGates.description: At least 80% of participants correctly identify where audio, transcripts, training data, and personal models are stored after seeing the relevant workflow.
At least 80% of participants correctly distinguish Vocabulary from Voice model after completing both tasks.
No participant must discover a required action only by hovering.

localSubstituteEvidence.limitation: Prototype blocker evidence does not replace the final moderated release usability study.
Semantic copy and accessible-name checks do not replace observed participant task completion.
Local accessibility evidence does not replace participant comprehension or task-success evidence.
Viewport/state screenshot checks do not replace moderated usability evidence.

openFollowUps.description: Run consented moderated final-candidate sessions covering first transcript, vocabulary, enrollment, training, export, import, and delete-data tasks.
If participant sessions remain unavailable, record an explicit release decision before tagging v0.6.0; do not claim usability gates passed.

releaseDecision.rationale: Issue #255 requires final moderated release usability evidence. This artifact records the evidence gap only and must not be treated as a completed study.
releaseDecision.requiredBeforeClosingIssue255: Add consented participant evidence for the required tasks and comprehension gates, or record an explicit human release decision that accepts the missing evidence while keeping claims accurate.
